_comment: Resolution summary posted after successful evictions

text.text:
📝 *Writing incident to memory for future reference.*

*Recommended follow-up actions:*
• Add nginx log rotation config to `imageprovider` deployment
• Set `NGINX_LOG_LEVEL=warn` as default in `otel-demo/values.yaml`
• Add `ephemeral-storage` limit to `imageprovider` resources
• Consider rate-limiting `loadgenerator` under disk pressure conditions
• Add this pattern to disk-pressure skill playbook

elements.text: Resolved at 2026-05-15T02:05:44Z · Root cause: imageprovider nginx NGINX_LOG_LEVEL=debug under high traffic
